findings.evidence: grep hits: `SubgroupQuotient.lean:118:@[expose] def topSubgroupOrbitQuotientToDeckOrbitQuotient`; nearby stronger pattern is `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:277:@[expose] def subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv : SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient (⊤ : Subgroup (Deck p)) b ≃ FiberOrbitQuotient p b`.
findings.fix: Replace or supplement it with a `subgroupOrbitQuotientTopEquiv : SubgroupOrbitQuotient p (⊤ : Subgroup (Deck p)) ≃ MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient (Deck p) E` and derive the one-way map/continuity from that as needed.
findings.issue: `topSubgroupOrbitQuotientToDeckOrbitQuotient` exposes only a one-way map from `E / (⊤ : Subgroup (Deck p))` to `E / Deck p`, although these quotient relations are equivalent.

summary: The arbitrary subgroup-inclusion map is now present, but the top-subgroup comparison is still exposed at the wrong level: it should identify the top-subgroup quotient with the full deck quotient by an equivalence, matching the neighboring fibre API.
